title: Ageratina enixa
taxonomy: Ageratina enixa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places Ageratina enixa within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The genus Ageratina is a group of flowering plants that are native to Central and South America, and Ageratina enixa is a specific species within this genus. The plant is further classified as a member of the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Ageratina enixa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Asteraceae family.
